content:
{"cards": [{"name": "Arcane Deliberation", "mana_cost": "{2}{U}{U}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Choose one —
• Draw three cards.
• Look at the top seven cards of your library. Put two of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.
• Return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.", "flavor_text": "Knowledge is power, but wisdom lies in choosing which knowledge to seek.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "A modal spell that gives blue three different card advantage options. The first mode is straightforward card draw. The second mode provides powerful selection but fewer total cards. The third mode enables spell recursion. The 4-mana cost with double blue ensures this is a significant investment requiring heavy blue commitment. Modal design allows players to adapt to different game states."}, {"name": "Shadow Strike", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Destroy target creature with power 3 or less.", "flavor_text": "In the darkness between heartbeats, death finds its mark.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Conditional creature removal at common. The power restriction keeps it balanced - it can't kill large threats but handles most early game creatures and utility creatures. At 3 mana, it's fairly costed for common removal with a meaningful restriction. The targeting language is clean and follows established patterns for conditional destruction."}, {"name": "Gravebound Harvester", "mana_cost": "{3}{B}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Creature — Zombie Warlock", "oracle_text": "When ~ enters, return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.
{2}{B}, Sacrifice a creature: Each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.", "flavor_text": null, "power": "2", "toughness": "3", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "An uncommon creature that combines graveyard recursion with sacrifice synergy. The ETB ability provides immediate value by returning a creature from graveyard. The activated ability converts creatures into life drain, fitting black's sacrifice-for-value theme. Stats are below curve (2/3 for 4 mana) to account for the powerful abilities. Both abilities are solidly in black's color pie."}, {"name": "Malachar, Death's Shadow", "mana_cost": "{3}{B}{B}{B}", "cmc": 6, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Legendary Creature — Demon Lord", "oracle_text": "Flying, deathtouch
When ~ enters, destroy all non-Demon creatures.
Whenever a creature dies, you may pay 2 life. If you do, draw a card.", "flavor_text": "Where he treads, only death and knowledge remain.", "power": "6", "toughness": "6", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "A mythic legendary Demon that serves as a powerful build-around commander. The triple black cost ensures heavy black commitment. Flying and deathtouch provide evasion and combat dominance. The board wipe ETB is devastating but asymmetric (spares Demons). The death trigger converts dying creatures into card draw for a life payment, creating a powerful engine. The 6/6 body and multiple powerful abilities justify the mythic rarity."}, {"name": "Volcanic Burst", "mana_cost": "{1}{R}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "~ deals 3 damage to target creature or planeswalker.", "flavor_text": "The mountain's anger erupts in searing fury.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "A clean burn spell at common that can't target players, making it creature/planeswalker removal rather than face damage. 3 damage for 2 mana is the standard rate for non-face burn spells. The targeting restriction keeps it balanced for common while still being useful. Red gets efficient damage-based removal that can hit planeswalkers, differentiating it from black's destroy effects."}]}
